product_overview: Multimodal LinkedIn content generation platform that produces caption text, image/carousel assets, and research-backed repurposing using LLMs and external scrapers. The backend exposes generation, streaming progress (SSE), draft lifecycle, research/surveillance, and brand/persona management APIs for tenant-scoped workflows.
core_goals: Provide deterministic multimodal LinkedIn post generation across 128 routing configurations (type, purpose, visual aspect, aspect ratio).
Stream real-time generation progress to clients via SSE and support non-streaming synchronous generation.
Persist generation history and support full draft CRUD + publish/scheduling integration with Blotato.
Integrate research/surveillance pipelines (Apify, yt-dlp) to inform repurposing and feed CRM/lead intelligence.
Expose tenant-scoped settings, brand extraction/theming, and persona retrieval to drive prompt injection and consistent outputs.

features.name: Health and Runtime Diagnostics
features.description: Runtime liveness/readiness checks and model/runtime configuration diagnostics to verify service and integration availability without leaking secrets.
user_flows: GET /api/health without auth -> Receive 200 { status: 'ok', checks: {supabase: true, gemini: true, apify: true} }
GET /api/health/models without auth -> Receive 200 { text_model: 'gemini-3-pro-preview', image_model: 'gemini-3-pro-image-preview', env_flags: {...} }

GET /api/health without auth -> Receive 200 { status: 'degraded', checks: {gemini: false, message: 'model provider unreachable'} } -> GET /api/health/models without auth -> Receive 200 { text_model: 'unknown', image_model: null, env_flags: {GEMINI_TEXT_MODEL: null} }

features.name: Content Generation and Regeneration API
features.description: Tenant-authenticated endpoints to generate posts and assets (synchronous or SSE streaming), plus caption & image regeneration flows that accept existing post context and style instructions.
user_flows: POST /api/generate-stream with valid GenerateRequest and Authorization: Bearer <token> -> Receive 200 text/event-stream and SSE event 'stage' {"stage":"text_start"}, SSE event 'stage' {"stage":"text_done"}, SSE event 'stage' {"stage":"image_start"}, SSE event 'stage' {"stage":"image_done"}, SSE event 'result' with JSON {"caption":"...","single_point":"...","image_prompt":"...","asset_url":"..."}
POST /api/generate with valid GenerateRequest and Authorization: Bearer <token> -> Receive 200 Generation payload JSON { caption, single_point, image_prompt, asset_url }
POST /api/regenerate-caption with RegenerateCaptionRequest and Authorization: Bearer <token> -> Receive 200 { caption: "Regenerated caption text" }
POST /api/regenerate-image with RegenerateImageRequest and Authorization: Bearer <token> -> Receive 200 { image_url: "https://.../regenerated.png", prompt: "refined image prompt" }

POST /api/generate with malformed body (null vs non-Optional fields) and Authorization: Bearer <token> -> Receive 422 RequestValidationError with detail (Pydantic validation errors) and returned error/detail fields
POST /api/generate-stream with expired/invalid Authorization: Bearer <token> -> Receive 401 Unauthorized

POST /api/generate-stream with valid Authorization: Bearer <token> and valid GenerateRequest -> Receive 200 text/event-stream and SSE event 'stage' {"stage":"text_start"} -> Receive SSE event 'error' with data {"error":"Gemini API timeout"} (external model provider failure) and stream closes

features.name: History and Draft Lifecycle
features.description: Store and query generation history, create/edit/delete drafts, and publish/schedule drafts through Blotato integration with validation and tenant scoping.
user_flows: POST /api/drafts with DraftSaveRequest and Authorization: Bearer <token> -> Receive 200 { message: 'saved', draft: { id: 'draft_123', title: '...', status: 'draft', ... } }
GET /api/drafts with Authorization: Bearer <token> -> Receive 200 { drafts: [ { id: 'draft_123', ... } ] }
PUT /api/drafts/{draft_id} with DraftUpdateRequest and Authorization: Bearer <token> -> Receive 200 { message: 'updated' }
POST /api/drafts/{draft_id}/publish with PublishRequest and Authorization: Bearer <token> -> Receive 200 PublishResult
POST /api/drafts/{draft_id}/publish with PublishRequest and Authorization: Bearer <token> but Blotato returns validation/scheduling error -> Receive 422 { detail: 'Invalid scheduling time' }
DELETE /api/drafts/{draft_id} with Authorization: Bearer <token> -> Receive 200 { message: 'deleted' }
GET /api/history with Authorization: Bearer <token> -> Receive 200 History[] (most recent first, max 100 entries)

features.name: Research and Surveillance APIs
features.description: Run viral, competitor, and YouTube research pipelines and surface cached surveillance analytics; supports refresh triggers for scraping pipelines.
user_flows: POST /api/research/viral with ResearchRequest and Authorization: Bearer <token> -> Receive 200 ResearchResult (ranked viral posts, metadata, parsed hooks)
POST /api/research/competitor with ResearchRequest and Authorization: Bearer <token> -> Receive 200 ResearchResult (profile scrape summary)
POST /api/research/youtube with ResearchRequest and Authorization: Bearer <token> -> Receive 200 ResearchResult (transcripts, thumbnail analysis, recommended clips)

POST /api/surveillance/refresh with Authorization: Bearer <token> -> Receive 200 { status: 'refresh_started' } -> GET /api/surveillance/data with Authorization: Bearer <token> -> Receive 200 { summary: {...}, posts: [...] }
POST /api/research/viral with ResearchRequest and Authorization: Bearer <token> but Apify actor times out -> Receive 500 { error: 'Apify actor timeout' }

features.name: User Settings and Brand/Persona Data
features.description: Read and update per-tenant settings, extract/preview and persist brand assets, and fetch persona profiles used to inject writing and brand context into generation prompts.
user_flows: GET /api/settings with Authorization: Bearer <token> -> Receive 200 Settings object (professional_bio, writing_style_rules, brand_id, publishing_config, ...)
POST /api/settings with SettingsUpdateRequest and Authorization: Bearer <token> -> Receive 200 { success: true }
POST /api/preview-brand with { url } and Authorization: Bearer <token> -> Receive 200 Brand preview payload (colors, fonts, logo_candidates, palette)
POST /api/save-brand with BrandSaveRequest and Authorization: Bearer <token> -> Receive 200 { success: true, brand_id: 'brand_abc' }
GET /api/brand with Authorization: Bearer <token> -> Receive 200 Brand object (persisted palette, theme tokens)
GET /api/persona with Authorization: Bearer <token> -> Receive 200 Persona object (professional_bio, core_skills, tone_of_voice)
POST /api/preview-brand with invalid URL and Authorization: Bearer <token> -> Receive 422 { detail: 'Invalid URL' }
POST /api/save-brand with Authorization: Bearer <token> but Supabase RLS denies write -> Receive 403 Forbidden

features.name: Health and Runtime Diagnostics
features.description: Liveness/readiness and model configuration diagnostics for deployment/runtime checks.

endpoints.description: Returns service health and integration probe status.
Returns effective model/runtime config diagnostics without secret leakage.

response_schema.200: { text_model: string, image_model: string, env_flags: object }

Regenerates image prompt/image asset using post context and style controls.

known_limitations.issue: Auth verification occasionally times out and can return transient 401 on authenticated endpoints.
known_limitations.impact: Intermittent unauthorized responses and flaky API behavior under network/auth provider latency.

known_limitations.issue: Several workflows depend on external APIs (Apify, Gemini, Blotato) without full local stubs.
known_limitations.impact: Backend tests may be non-deterministic unless mocked or isolated.
